---
title: "chess-ELO-ratings"
author: "Jess Chen"
format: gfm
editor: visual
---

Approach

1.  Upload chess file into R markup file (either create my own or ask a classmate for their cleaned up file from project 1).
2.  Manually calculate a few players expected scores and diff from actual score.
3.  Create code to calculate scores for all players and rank top 5 and bottom 5.
